title: Understated Mediterranean Anko-red-bean-paste Bao
description: A savory, crumbly, monsoon-inspired Mediterranean dish featuring anko-red-bean-paste and mantecare-emulsified egg, suitable for high-protein diets.
instructions: Combine anko-red-bean-paste, mantecare, and egg in a bowl and mix until well combined.
Add crumbled feta cheese and chopped parsley to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Lightly knead the whole wheat bao dough until smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 4-6 equal pieces, depending on desired bao size.
Roll each piece of dough into a ball and flatten slightly into a disk shape.
Place a tablespoon of the anko-red-bean-paste mixture in the center of each dough disk.
Fold the dough over the filling and press edges together to seal.
Place bao on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake at 375°F (190°C) for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
Let baos cool slightly before serving to avoid burning the mouth.
If desired, serve with a side of tzatziki sauce for added creaminess.
